rationale: Section 11.423 governs late-qualification procedures for charitable organization and youth association exemptions under Sections 11.18 and 11.19. It is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption amount in Section 11.13(b).
quote: QUALIFICATION OF CHARITABLE ORGANIZATION OR YOUTH ASSOCIATION
_note: No conflict; §11.423 addresses charitable/youth association exemptions, not residence homestead exemptions.
